# SPo2 Test Golden Vectors

These vectors characterize `PbSpo2TestResult` to public SPo2 test model mapping before KMP migration. The vectors intentionally keep Android and iOS expectations separate where the public models differ today: Android exposes `testTime` as a formatted string and has no public `triggerType` field, while iOS exposes a `Date` and `triggerType`. `Spo2CommonPolicyTest.kt` now executes shared optional-presence preservation, empty recording-device normalization, nullable trigger-type policy, unknown enum mapping policy, and `spo2-readiness.json` behavior-family coverage for full passed/normal field mapping, optional protobuf presence preservation, empty recording-device normalization, Android no-trigger-field and iOS trigger-field platform references, unknown SPo2-class boundary behavior, platform SPo2 vector references, and the `compile-verification-gate` before production SPo2 model code moves.
